objective: Materialize the Wave 37 signature-profile selections as schema-valid heuristic rows so the target can be split and audited without entering exact supervision.
non_negotiables: Rows must use label_kind=heuristic, not label_kind=exact.
Every row must carry supervision_eligible=false and diagnostic_only target status.
The shard must validate under the Partizan label schema and pass split/leakage reporting.
Existing exact composition shards and exact-value claims must remain unchanged.

tasks.prompt: Add a CLI command that emits selected signature-profile targets as heuristic dataset-label rows with diagnostic-only outputs, explicit promotion blockers, and no exact provenance.
outputs: Regression test proving rows are heuristic and schema-valid
Stable W18/W22/W27 hashes and replay reports
acceptance: The shard has 30 heuristic rows and zero exact rows.
Rows are balanced 10/10/10 across the three generated topology families.
Every row carries target_status=diagnostic_only and supervision_eligible=false.

tasks.prompt: Record the Wave 39 heuristic shard, validate schema, run split/leakage reporting, and update ledgers. Keep the result outside exact target metrics and note that split reports now preserve unprovenanced heuristic fallback names.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Split report has train/dev/test counts 25/3/2 and zero leakage violations.
Docs state that heuristic diagnostic rows are not exact training data.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_39_signature_target_diagnostic_shard.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 39 plan is internally consistent.
The signature target diagnostic shard is schema-valid.
The signature target diagnostic split report has no leakage violations.
